title: Add partners section and openable sidebar navigation

requirements.text: Add a 'Partners' section on the home page (landing page) that displays FreshGuard's partnerships with Frigidaire, Whirlpool, and KitchenAid. Show each brand name prominently (and logo placeholder if available), styled consistently with the existing FreshGuard brand design. Place this section between existing home page sections in a logical position (e.g., after the Hero or Features section).

quotes: add onto the first page that we are partners with Frigidaire, Whirlpool and KitchenAid

acceptanceCriteria: A 'Partners' or 'Our Partners' section is visible on the home/landing page
Frigidaire, Whirlpool, and KitchenAid are each displayed as partner brands
The section matches the FreshGuard visual theme and does not appear out of place
Section is responsive and looks correct on mobile and desktop

requirements.text: Implement an openable/closeable sidebar navigation drawer that slides in from the left (or right) when triggered by a hamburger/menu button. The sidebar must list navigation links to every page and section: Business Plan, How It Works, Financials, The Pitch, and Sharks Vote — matching the screenshot provided. Clicking a link should navigate to or scroll to the corresponding page/section and close the sidebar. The trigger button must be persistently visible on all pages.

quotes: make something like this screenshot where viewers of the website can open sidebar where they will be able to access every page easier

acceptanceCriteria: A menu/hamburger button is always visible on the page regardless of which section is active
Clicking the button opens a sidebar drawer with navigation links
Sidebar contains links: Business Plan, How It Works, Financials, The Pitch, Sharks Vote
Clicking any sidebar link navigates to or scrolls to the corresponding section/page
Clicking a link or an outside area closes the sidebar
Sidebar is styled consistently with the FreshGuard brand and matches the clean, minimal style shown in the screenshot
Sidebar works correctly on both mobile and desktop screen sizes

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
Do not alter the existing page routing logic in App.tsx beyond what is needed to support sidebar navigation
Sidebar navigation items must match exactly: Business Plan, How It Works, Financials, The Pitch, Sharks Vote
nonGoals: Adding official partner brand logos or assets (text names are sufficient)
Backend changes — no data persistence required for partners or sidebar state
Adding new pages beyond those already existing
